message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title AddMemberToGroupSequenceDiagram

participant "IntegrationTest" as IntegrationTest
participant "Spring Application" as SpringApplication
participant "De\nSerializer" as DeSerializer
participant "ctrl:AddMemberToGroupController" as Controller
participant "AddMemberRequestAssembler" as RequestAssembler
participant "AddMemberResponseDTOAssembler" as ResponseAssembler
participant "srv:AddMemberToGroupService" as Service

note right of Service: Continues through next Diagram

IntegrationTest -> SpringApplication: POST 1 /groups/"Family"/members/"ana@gmail.com"

activate SpringApplication
    SpringApplication -> DeSerializer: 1.1 deserialize("groupDesc":"Family", "personEmail":"ana@gmail.com")
    
    activate DeSerializer
        DeSerializer -> DeSerializer: 1.1.1 create (groupDesc, PersonEmail)
        box #EEE "info:AddMemberRequestInfoDTO"
            endbox
        deactivate DeSerializer
    
    SpringApplication -> Controller: 1.2 addMember(info)
    
    activate Controller
        Controller -> RequestAssembler: addMemberMapToDTO 1.2.1 (info.getGroupDescription(), info.getPersonEmail())
        
        activate RequestAssembler
            RequestAssembler -> RequestAssembler: 1.2.1.1 create
            box #EEE "requestDTO: AddMemberRequestDTO"
                endbox
            deactivate RequestAssembler
        
        Controller -> Service: 1.2.2 addMemeber(requestDTO)
        
        activate Service
            Service --> Controller: 1.2.3 groupDTO
            deactivate Service
        
        Controller -> ResponseAssembler: 1.2.4 mapToGroupResponseDTO(GroupDTO)
        
        activate ResponseAssembler
            ResponseAssembler -> ResponseAssembler: 1.2.4.1 create
            box #EEE "groupRespDTO: GroupResponseDTO"
                endbox
            ResponseAssembler --> Controller: 1.2.5 groupRespDTO
            deactivate ResponseAssembler
        
        Controller --> SpringApplication: 1.2.6 ResponseEntity(groupRespDTO, HttpStatus.OK)
        deactivate Controller
    
    SpringApplication -> DeSerializer: 1.3 serialize(ResponseEntity(groupRespDTO, HttpStatus.OK))
    
    activate DeSerializer
        DeSerializer --> SpringApplication: 1.4 HttpResponse
        deactivate DeSerializer
    
    SpringApplication --> IntegrationTest: 1.5 HttpResponse
deactivate SpringApplication

@enduml
```
